This is a Vegetarian product.

About this item

  • No Maida No Atta - Our noodles are made of 100% cold pressed oats flour with no addition of refined maida or atta
  • Not Fried - Jiwa oats noodles are air dried vs other instant noodles that are fried in palm oil
  • Replacement to Regular Noodles - Our oats noodles cook in 7 minutes and are a great replacement to any other maida, atta or rice noodles
  • Nutrients - This oats noodle makes no compromise with nutrients such as fiber, vitamins & minerals, protein and is free of artificial enhancers
  • The Uses - This product can be used as a salad base, maida noodle replacement and goes well with multiple gluten free recipes

Important information

Ingredients:

Oats flour (94%), Guar gum & Salt

Directions:

In a bowl, boil water with a drop of oil and a pinch of salt. Add Jiwa Instant Oats Noodles and let it cook for 5-7 minutes. Once cooked drain and rinse with cold water. Make any preparation of your choice. Serve hot or cold

Legal Disclaimer:

Actual product packaging and materials may contain more and different information than what is shown on our app or website. We recommend that you do not rely solely on the information presented here and that you always read labels, warnings, and directions before using or consuming a product.

Product description

Get the noodles, leave the junk. Hard to believe? Make a switch to 'Jiwa Instant Oats Noodles!' Made with our signature cold pressed oats flour, this hand cut millet noodle is not fried & ready in less than 7 minutes! Use to make hakka noodles or a delicious Italian spaghetti we promise you’ll slurp up every last bite!

From the manufacturer

Aglio olio Oats Noodles

Cooking Instructions:

  • In a bowl boil water with a drop of oil and a pinch of salt
  • Add 'Jiwa Instant Oats Noodles' and let it cook for 5 to 7 minutes
  • Once cooked drain and rinse with cold water
  • Toss in with 1/2 tsp oil, 4 cloves of finely chopped garlic and a pinch of paprika and salt to taste
  • Add in the oats noodles, serve hot and fresh

FAQs

Is Jiwa Instant Noodles healthy?

Jiwa instant noodles are made with 100% oats, they are not fried & are gluten free. Market noodles are made from refined maida, are full of artificial enhancers & fried in palm oil, before they are packed and delivered to our homes.

How are Jiwa instant noodles different from other market noodles?

Jiwa instant noodles are made with 100% oats, nothing else unlike market noodles that add wheat / maida to their noodles. Our noodles are made from Jiwa 30 degree flours, which adds to the flavour and fiber content making it a healthier choice.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Customers say

Customers find these noodles taste amazing and appreciate them as a healthy alternative to regular ones. The product is made of oats and is high in fiber, with one customer noting it's lower in unhealthy fats. Customers praise its quality, with one mentioning it's a great option for kids' tiffin.

About this Item

  • No Maida No Atta - Our noodles are made of 100% cold pressed oats flour with no addition of refined maida or atta
  • Not Fried - Jiwa oats noodles are air dried vs other instant noodles that are fried in palm oil
  • Replacement to Regular Noodles - Our oats noodles cook in 7 minutes and are a great replacement to any other maida, atta or rice noodles
  • Nutrients - This oats noodle makes no compromise with nutrients such as fiber, vitamins & minerals, protein and is free of artificial enhancers
  • The Uses - This product can be used as a salad base, maida noodle replacement and goes well with multiple gluten free recipes

Product description

Get the noodles, leave the junk. Hard to believe? Make a switch to 'Jiwa Instant Oats Noodles!' Made with our signature cold pressed oats flour, this hand cut millet noodle is not fried & ready in less than 7 minutes! Use to make hakka noodles or a delicious Italian spaghetti we promise you’ll slurp up every last bite!

Important Information

Ingredients:

Oats flour (94%), Guar gum & Salt

Directions:

In a bowl, boil water with a drop of oil and a pinch of salt. Add Jiwa Instant Oats Noodles and let it cook for 5-7 minutes. Once cooked drain and rinse with cold water. Make any preparation of your choice. Serve hot or cold
